assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 3): Legal Semantic Search

Section 6 confirmation pass is test-set model selection. BM25 fixed vs. tuned transformer is a secondary confound. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 3): Legal Semantic Search

Confirmation pass selects between configurations based on test-set reversal — test-set contamination. BM25 tuning asymmetry is secondary. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 3): Legal Semantic Search

The design has strong controls (contract-family split, near-duplicate detection) but Section 6 undermines the evaluation with test-set-conditional checkpoint selection. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3): eval_scenario_682

All three: critique_wins. Unanimous across all runs.

Verdict: critique_wins
